case_title: HAIQING QIU ET AL VS. SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF QIU, HAIQING ( GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR ANGEL QUI ) QUI, HAIQING ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-05-2018 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-05-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-05-2018 BY CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS. PLAINTIFF HAIQING QIU IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER DOROTHY WONG #300601. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY ELIZABETH MILLER, SENIOR CLAIM SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT DOES NOT DISPUTE SERVICE OF PROCESS AND WAIVES RIGHT TO SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF QIU, HAIQING ( GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR ANGEL QUI ) QUI, HAIQING IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
